terrain: Deformable granular terrain — Bekker-Wong pressure-sinkage (Kφ=0.2e6, Kc=0, n=1.1) + Janosi-Hanamoto shear (K=0.01 m). Internal friction angle randomised per trial [10.0°, 30.0°]. Wheel entrapment emerges from load-driven sinkage and limited shear strength.
fidelity_gap_notes: Rigid body solver: Chrono NSC (complementarity) vs MPM implicit — different numerical treatment of multi-body contact.

Terrain: Deformable granular terrain — Bekker-Wong pressure-sinkage (Kφ=0.2e6, Kc=0, n=1.1) + Janosi-Hanamoto shear (K=0.01 m). Internal friction angle randomised per trial [10.0°, 30.0°]. Wheel entrapment emerges from load-driven sinkage and limited shear strength.
Rover mass: Curiosity 899 kg vs AAU ~35 kg; wheel radius 0.25 m vs 0.10 m. Genuine morphological domain gap.
